headline: Palantir's Joe Lonsdale Once Explained Why You 'Need To Destroy Some Jobs,' But The Human Cost Of The Upcoming AI Era Is Already Becoming Clear

headline: Microsoft cuts OpenAI revenue share in a fresh step to loosen their AI alliance
summary: Microsoft said Monday it will no longer pay a share of its revenue to ChatGPT maker OpenAI, the latest move to untether a close partnership that helped unleash an artificial intelligence boom.  OpenAI relied exclusively on Microsoft's investments in cloud computing services to build the technology that helped make ChatGPT a household name.  Microsoft, in turn, relied on OpenAI's technology to build its own AI assistant Copilot.

content.title: Microsoft cuts OpenAI revenue share in a fresh step to loosen their AI alliance
content.summary: Microsoft said Monday it will no longer pay a share of its revenue to ChatGPT maker OpenAI, the latest move to untether a close partnership that helped unleash an artificial intelligence boom.  OpenAI relied exclusively on Microsoft's investments in cloud computing services to build the technology that helped make ChatGPT a household name.  Microsoft, in turn, relied on OpenAI's technology to build its own AI assistant Copilot.

thumbnail.caption: FILE - A ChapGPT logo is seen in West Chester, Pa., Wednesday, Dec. 6, 2023. (AP Photo/Matt Rourke, File)

headline: Bloom Energy Oracle Deal Links Fuel Cells To AI Data Center Demand
summary: Bloom Energy (NYSE:BE) has expanded its partnership with Oracle under a master services agreement for up to 2.8 GW of fuel cell systems. The agreement focuses on supplying on site power for Oracle's U.S. data centers as AI driven demand for computing capacity grows. This expansion adds to Bloom Energy's contracted backlog, which stands at around $20b. For investors watching the intersection of energy and digital infrastructure, this move places Bloom Energy directly in the power stack of...

headline: Elon Musk vs. Sam Altman: What to know about the OpenAI case
summary: Tesla (TSLA) and SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) CEO Elon Musk is meeting OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) CEO Sam Altman in court this week over an alleged breach of the private artificial intelligence (AI) developer's nonprofit mission. Musk is also a co-founder of OpenAI. Yahoo Finance Technology Editor Dan Howley explains what investors should know.

content.title: Elon Musk vs. Sam Altman: What to know about the OpenAI case
content.description:
Tesla (TSLA) and SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) CEO Elon Musk is meeting OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) CEO Sam Altman in court this week over an alleged breach of the private artificial intelligence (AI) developer's nonprofit mission. Musk is also a co-founder of OpenAI.

Yahoo Finance Technology Editor Dan Howley explains what investors should know.
content.summary: Tesla (TSLA) and SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) CEO Elon Musk is meeting OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) CEO Sam Altman in court this week over an alleged breach of the private artificial intelligence (AI) developer's nonprofit mission. Musk is also a co-founder of OpenAI. Yahoo Finance Technology Editor Dan Howley explains what investors should know.

headline: Oracle, BorderPlex, and Bloom Energy to Power Project Jupiter with Cleaner, Water-Efficient Fuel Cell Technology
summary: Oracle and BorderPlex Digital Assets today announced Project Jupiter will utilize Bloom Energy fuel cells to fully power the AI data center campus in Doña Ana County, New Mexico. As part of Oracle and Bloom's previously announced expanded partnership, the data center will be supported by up to 2.45 GW of installed Bloom fuel cell capacity. This updated power design will replace Project Jupiter's previously planned gas turbines and diesel generators and consolidate the facility into one single mi
